name: DOORS ROLEPLAY - THE HOTEL
description:
Look at these goobers >:3 I decided to make a full doors rp bot because I haven’t seen one for the whole cast! The starting message doesn’t have a specific pov since i wanted to make it more flexible for whatever you want to do, like if you wanna mess around with the entities or play as your oc :3

Also for warning, some of these do have my headcanons but they’re not like very big or important :3 just small little things that I thought was cute or something I just enjoy :D

I hope you guys have fun with this one :D I’m still new to making bots so any criticism would be great! Also if you want me to add anyone to here then just ask me :3

entities i currently have here: Seek, Figure, Screech, Rush, Ambush, Hide, Dupe, Sally, Jack, Eyes, Halt, and Dread.

keywords or whatever for search: Doors, Roblox, Roleplaying, Horror
creator: MimikoTheSilliAlien
